MartiniSurf Documentation

MartiniSurf is a toolkit to build Martini protein/DNA systems on surfaces, including linker workflows and optional solvation/ionization.

  • Overview
    • Main capabilities
    • Output structure
  • Installation
    • Local installation
    • External tools required
    • Quick checks
    • Build docs locally

    • Example 05: Protein + Not explicit Linker + solvate + ionize
    • Example 06: DNA + linker + solvate + ionize + frozen water
    • Example 07: Pre-CG protein+cofactor + substrate + solvate + ionize
    • Basic build-only examples
  • CLI Reference
    • Compact package help
    • Full package help
    • Main pipeline help
    • Module helps
  • MartiniSurf Quick Guide for New Users
    • 1) 30-second rules

    • 3) Pick your workflow
    • 4) Copy-and-run commands

    • 6) Full flag reference (martinisurf main pipeline)
    • 7) Advanced flags (internal modules)
    • 8) Output structure to check
    • 9) Common errors and direct fixes
    • 10) Practical checklist before long runs
    • 11) Short software evaluation
